caption: A man with dark skin, glasses, and a distinctive grey, spiked wig is seated in a podcast studio. He wears a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders, with black headphones over his ears. He is speaking into a black professional microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with several framed photographs and a mannequin wearing a white garment. To his right, clothing items, including a yellow garment with "LEE" written on it, are visible. A recurring logo on the screen features a red microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, his expression and mouth movement shifting slightly as he continues to talk, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
